diversity_gate.note: No qualifying PT primary source found after 8 supplementary PT searches. Mesa Marcada (byline inaccessible — text adapted from Revista de Vinhos), Observador (podcast-only, no extractable article text), Publico/Fugas (geo-blocked 451), Porto Secreto (JS security block), NCultura/Saber Viver/Viaje Comigo (no named author). Documented as structural characteristic of Porto PT food writing web landscape.

both_pool_note: 0 both-pool entries. Visão (PT) covers 2024 new openings; EN sources cover established Ribeira restaurants and 2024 best-bites across different venues. No restaurant appears in both a PT and EN qualifying source.
